experiment_title: 多种离子反应现象观察实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="多种离子反应现象观察实验" goal="观察Cu²⁺、Na⁺、Fe³⁺等离子与氨水、硝酸银、硫氰化钾、K₃[Fe(CN)₆]等试剂反应时的颜色变化和沉淀生成现象" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" />
      <Component id="test_tube_3" type="test_tube" />
      <Component id="test_tube_4" type="test_tube" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_2" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_3" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_4" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_5" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_6" type="dropper" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="CuSO4_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="NaCl_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="distilled_water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="NH3_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="ethanol" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="AgNO3_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Fe2(SO4)3_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="KSCN_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="K3Fe(CN)6_solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="CuSO4" volume="2 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="NaCl" volume="2 mL" tool="dropper_2" id="step_1" />
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_3" reagent="H2O" volume="2 mL" tool="dropper_3" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_4" reagent="H2O" volume="2 mL" tool="dropper_4" id="step_3" />
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="NH3" volume="0.5 mL" tool="dropper_5" id="step_4" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_5" />
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="NH3" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper_5" id="step_6" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="C2H5OH" volume="0.2 mL" tool="dropper_6" id="step_7" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_8" />
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="AgNO3" volume="0.2 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_9" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_10" />
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_3" reagent="Fe2(SO4)3" volume="2 drops" tool="dropper_2" id="step_11" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_3" reagent="KSCN" volume="2 drops" tool="dropper_3" id="step_12" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_13" />
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_4" reagent="K3[Fe(CN)6]" volume="2 drops" tool="dropper_4" id="step_14" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_4" reagent="Fe2(SO4)3" volume="2 drops" tool="dropper_2" id="step_15" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_16" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 分别向4支试管中加入待反应的溶液或蒸馏水，为后续各组离子反应做准备。
向含Cu²⁺的试管中分步加入氨水和乙醇，观察沉淀生成、颜色变化等现象。
向含NaCl的试管中加入硝酸银溶液，观察沉淀生成等现象。
向含蒸馏水的试管中依次加入Fe³⁺和硫氰酸钾溶液，观察颜色变化。
向另一支含蒸馏水的试管中依次加入铁离子和铁氰化钾溶液，观察沉淀或颜色变化。
